feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Worker availabilty data cds view and block time sheet entries for non working days
entry.content:
Hi, do you know in which CDS the availability data is stored, e.g. if I create via the API an entry for an Worker for public holiday? I can successfully create an entry and I do see it in the manage my time sheet app a a grey block for the specific day. And would it be possible to block time sheet entries for non working days?

thanks in advance

Gabriel

entry.title: SAP HCM Mini Master Usage without Combability Pack
entry.content:
We plan to use Mini master infotypes mentioned in the SAP Note 3369920 - SAP S/4HANA without HCM - use of HR mini-master (subset of HCM infotypes) - SAP for Me . In addition to these mini master infotypes, can we use PD Infotypes(Organization Management Infotypes) like Infotypes 1000, 1001(Tables HRP1000, HRP1001) without any HCM license requirement? 

 # SAP HCM Mini Master SAP Fiori for SAP ERP HCM SAP SuccessFactors HXM Core SAP S/4HANA 

@SAPHCM

entry.title: Latency issues while opening the worksheet for 1500 Users in Variable pay
entry.content:
Hi,

This issue pertains to Bonus planning only, users are able to access and move the worksheet to next level approver with 700 employees without any issue. However, they are unable to access worksheet with 1500 employees using Microsoft edge and chrome browsers. They are able to access worksheet with 1500 employees with Mozilla Firefox browser in internal network but, restricted by IT Team to use Mozilla browser. 

I am writing this post get to know if someone has faced this issues and what was the workaround done, thanks.

 

Regards,

Amit

entry.title: Using both automatic overtime and approved overtime
entry.content:
Hello Expert, 

We have a condition where a group of personnel subarea will work from 08:00-19:00 with 1 hour break. From 17:00-19-00 will automatically be calculated as 150% overtime, after 19:00 the employee would still be able to do more overtime if they make a request for an overtime using IT2007.

I had tried using 2 approaches for this 

1. Using the automatic overtime function on daily work schedule, but it's clashed with IT2007 and not providing overtime pair

2. Using the fixed value on table T510S, it was able to generate the wage type for overtime. But it has the problem that it's applied to all personnel subarea.

Is there a way to make the fixed value on T510S only apply to certain personnel subarea?

Help would be really appreciated.

Thank you,

Kelvin

entry.title: SAP HCM and ME-Doc integration
entry.content:
Hello colleagues,

Does SAP HCM have any integration with a regulatory reporting service, such as ME-Doc? If not, are there any community-made options?

Thanks.

entry.title: BAPI for PA40 Create HR Mini Master Data
entry.content:
Hi,

which BAPI can I use to create a new HR-Mini-Master (HR-Ministamm) based on the PA40 Transaction in SAP S4?
I cant find the correct BAPI in the BAPI Explorer.

Best
Leonard

entry.title: Hi Guys,I need step by step procedure for income tax calculation including both new and old regime
entry.content:
Please provide step by step procedure for calculation of Income tax for both Old and New Regime.

Regards,

Nandan T M

entry.title: How Skill Library AI Creator works (20241H release)
entry.content:
I have three questions about the AI-powered skill library creation that was announced for the 2024 1H release.

1. Is it correct that the Skill Foundation, one of the three components of TIH (Growth Portfolio, Attribute Library, Skill Foundation), is responsible for creating the skill library using job requirements and job role information by using machine learning capabilities?

2. Will the AI automatically generate the library based on job requirements and job role information pre-loaded by customers in EC? Or will it be built using 3K job requirement data from external organizations? Alternatively, will it be a combination of both?

3. Where can customers access the AI-created skill library? Will the data automatically flow into the Attribute Library?

Thank you for your time and insights.

entry.title: Where can I find learning on the Termination Workbench
entry.content: Hi, I am keen to learn how the Termination Workbench sits together. How is it set up how does it know what to look for when commencing the pay component of the cycle.  Cheers Katja

entry.title: Enchacement for field P2011-PDC_USRUP in t-code PA61
entry.content:
Hi guys,

Hope you are ok .

My requirement is to fill the customer field for time-event, P2011-PDC_USRUP, in t-code PA61, infotype 2011. How can it be implemented? I checked that the name of report is MP200000, but none of the customer exits in there seems relevant for this requirement.

Thank you.

entry.title: How to create Person in HR?
entry.content:
HI HR Guru,

I know how to create Personnel no in HR by PA30.

There is another HR master called Person.

I don't know how to create Person in HR.

Please kindly help.

Sally

entry.title: Time off replication in H4S4 - available enhancements?
entry.content:
Hi,

In the H4S4 time off replication, has there been any facility added (Badi or enhanced  mapping ) when creating IT2001 absence records in SAP on replication from EC?

In our existing BIB configuration there is only the very basic A to B mapping available on absence replication with no ability to include logic or rules. 

Cheers

Brendan

entry.title: ABS_ATT_TYPE_NOT_FOUND runtimr error in CAT2 time entry
entry.content:
• We are creating a new company code 20 for a unit in UAE region and subsequent CATS configuration is in progress.
  • This configuration V_T500P does not allow entry of hours in CAT2 screen and gives runtime error.
  • The run time error vanishes when the HCM Localization parameter is changed from AE to 10. Ideally it should be AE
  • In debug mode we noticed that Molga = AE does not get copied over to MOABW which is a numeric field.

entry.title: Theme Manager - change font colour
entry.content: How can I change the font colour of the menu below the section title? For some sites it is shown correctly and for some not.

entry.title: SOC Standard Occupational Classification Tracking
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are looking to maintain the standard occupational classification (SOC) in SuccessFactors for USA. But I'm not able to find a standard field in the system. I have checked in Job Classification USA and its not available. Is this something which we have to build as a custom field?

Thanks in advance.

Megan Walter

entry.title: SOC Standard Occupational Classification Tracking
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are looking to maintain the standard occupational classification (SOC) in SuccessFactors for USA. But I'm not able to find a standard field in the system. I have checked in Job Classification USA and its not available. Is this something which we have to build as a custom field?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Clear Hit List PA20
entry.content: How can I clear the Hit List in the PA20 screen?

entry.title: What regular expressions are available to be used in Secondary Mapping Value conversion from SAP-EC
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

We need to replicate data from SAP ERP to Employee Central, but the data quality is quite a mess.

There are national ID from Molga 39 country (Chile) in different formats,

12.123.123-1

12123123-1

1231231231

 

The valid format would be this:

__.___.___-_

(the first one of the three above)

so i am trying to use value conversion this way,

according to the manual it should work

 

 

 

but is showing errors when replicating in se38

 

it is supposed to find the "-" if any and replace it by an <nbsp> space, the same with the points (\.) and after all, applying the correct format __.___.___-_

but it looks like seq number 1 and 2 (replace using patterns with string/ec field) don´t work if together only work if i delete one of them and leave the other. 

Maybe i need just to write everything in the same line and using a regular expressions as if i was writing ABAP code, but regular expressions like this [.-] are not working in this value conversion.

Therefore i would like to know if there are limitations for the regular expressions in this value conversion tool or they should work the same as if i was using ABAP code.

 

Thanks in advance

regards

entry.title: HIGH PRIORITY_Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PX0400
entry.content:
Hi,

WD to SAP Int. error. Emp is existing in WD but not interfaces to SAP, so trying to manual hire in pA40 but getting below error Please assist on below error 

 

Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx 

Message No. PBAS_SERVICE001

Diagnosis

If two users change a person's data at the same time, the system cannot decide which changes have priority. For this reason, only one user is ever permitted to make changes at any one time.

User Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx is currently editing the person.

System Response

The system does not allow you to edit the person.

Procedure

Wait until user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx  has finished editing the person.

Procedure for System Administration

User S_XI_PXxxxx  keeps a lock for lock object EPPRELE 80124140.

entry.title: Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PX0400
entry.content:
Hi,

WD to SAP Int. Error. Emp is existing in WD but not interfaces to SAP, so trying to manual hire in pA40 but getting below error Please assist on below error 

 

Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx 

Message No. PBAS_SERVICE001

Diagnosis

If two users change a person's data at the same time, the system cannot decide which changes have priority. For this reason, only one user is ever permitted to make changes at any one time.

User Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx is currently editing the person.

System Response

The system does not allow you to edit the person.

Procedure

Wait until user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx  has finished editing the person.

Procedure for System Administration

User S_XI_PXxxxx  keeps a lock for lock object EPPRELE 80124140.
